reference: SHE KNEW HER PLACE IN THE BOSTON HIERARCHY AND IT WAS NOT WHAT MISSUS FARRINDER SUPPOSED SO THAT THERE WAS A WANT OF PERSPECTIVE IN TALKING TO HER AS IF SHE HAD BEEN A REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ARISTOCRACY
text: she knew her place in the boston hierarchy and it was not what mrs farinder supposed so that there was a want of perspective in talking to her as if she had been a representative of the aristocracy
